entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A pulse crop (Cicer arietinum L.) contributing significantly to pulse production.

entities.name: HERBICIDE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to survive and grow despite the application of herbicides.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: A technique used to analyze the complete set of RNA transcripts in a cell or tissue.

entities.name: WEED
entities.description: Plants that compete with crops for resources, reducing yield.

entities.name: FUNGI
entities.description: Fungal organisms that cause diseases in crops.

entities.name: BACTERIAL DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases caused by bacterial pathogens in crops.

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Insects that damage crops.

entities.name: HERBICIDE
entities.description: Chemical substances used to control or kill unwanted plants.

entities.name: TRANSGENIC APPROACH
entities.description: A genetic engineering method to create herbicide tolerant crops.

entities.name: MARKER ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A non-transgenic breeding approach using molecular markers to select for desired traits.

entities.name: HERBICIDE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The capacity of specific chickpea varieties to withstand herbicide application.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME STUDIES
entities.description: Analysis of the transcriptome to identify genes associated with specific traits.

entities.name: LEGUME CROP
entities.description: A general category of nitrogen-fixing plants including chickpea.

entities.name: IMAZETHAPYR
entities.description: An imidazoline herbicide used to test for tolerance in chickpea genotypes.

entities.name: REFERENCE BASED ASSEMBLY
entities.description: A method of assembling sequencing reads using a known reference genome.

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes that show statistically significant differences in expression between two conditions.

entities.name: MIRNAS
entities.description: Small non-coding RNA molecules that regulate gene expression.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Proteins that bind to DNA to regulate the transcription of genes.

entities.name: HUB PROTEINS
entities.description: Highly connected proteins within a biological regulatory network.

entities.name: SSR-FDM
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat-Functional Domain Markers used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as genetic markers.

entities.name: INDELS
entities.description: Insertions and deletions in the DNA sequence used as markers.

entities.name: QPCR
entities.description: Quantitative polymerase chain reaction used to validate gene expression.

entities.name: XENOBIOTIC DEGRADATION
entities.description: The metabolic process of breaking down foreign chemical substances.

entities.name: GLUTATHIONE S-TRANSFERASE
entities.description: An enzyme/gene involved in the detoxification of xenobiotics.

entities.name: DNA REPLICATION GENES
entities.description: Genes responsible for the process of DNA replication.

entities.name: ABSCISIC ACID PATHWAY GENES
entities.description: Genes involved in the signaling pathway of the hormone abscisic acid.

entities.name: CYTOCHROME P450
entities.description: A family of enzymes involved in the metabolism of herbicides.

entities.name: XYLOGLUCAN ENDOTRANSGLUCOSYLASE/HYDROLASE
entities.description: A gene involved in cell wall modification and herbicide resistance.

entities.name: GLUTAMATE DEHYDROGENASE
entities.description: An enzyme/gene involved in nitrogen metabolism and herbicide resistance.

entities.name: METHYL CROTONOYL CARBOXYLASE
entities.description: A gene involved in metabolic pathways related to herbicide resistance.

entities.name: THAUMATIN-LIKE GENES
entities.description: Genes encoding proteins involved in plant defense and herbicide resistance.

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCE
entities.description: A collection of genetic data used for future candidate gene discovery.

entities.name: CHICKPEA GERMPLASM
entities.description: The genetic material of chickpea used for variety improvement.
